main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'incomplete removal of bisulfito and glicerina... insufficient rinsing' matches

key_signals.justification: C2: 7 signals: glicerina 320, ORP -10, caudal 70%, cond 580, rechazo 98.97, 1x30min, dP

alternatives.justification: C3: 2 alts (defecto fabricacion, oxidante) - falta 3a normal variabilidad

recommended_action.justification: C4: 3 aclarados 60 min + low P 5-10 bar + criterios glicerina<50 ORP>+50 - matches gold

requested_data.justification: C5: 3 anchors (bisulfito permeado, criterios continuacion, procedimiento OEM)

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: explicit: bisulfito<5 + glicerina descenso -> diferir; o dP>2 caudal<150 -> defecto
